mapper.update: UPDATE resumes SET is_primary = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE personal_profile_id = #{personalProfileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resumes ( personal_profile_id, title, summary, visibility, is_primary, resume_file_id ) VALUES ( #{personalProfileId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{visibility}, #{primary}, #{resumeFileId} )

INSERT INTO resume_sap_skills ( resume_id, sap_skill_id, proficiency_level, years_of_experience, is_primary ) VALUES
( #{resumeId}, #{skill.sapSkillId}, #{skill.proficiencyLevel}, #{skill.yearsOfExperience}, #{skill.isPrimary} )
ON CONFLICT (resume_id, sap_skill_id) DO UPDATE SET proficiency_level = EXCLUDED.proficiency_level, years_of_experience = EXCLUDED.years_of_experience, is_primary = EXCLUDED.is_primary
mapper.update: UPDATE resumes r SET title = #{request.title}, summary = #{request.summary}, visibility = #{visibility}, is_primary = #{request.isPrimary}, updated_at = NOW() FROM personal_profiles pp WHERE pp.id = r.personal_profile_id AND pp.user_id = #{userId} AND r.id = #{resumeId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_evaluations ( personal_profile_id, resume_id, overall_score, summary, model_name ) VALUES ( #{personalProfileId}, #{resumeId}, #{overallScore}, #{summary}, #{modelName} )

INSERT INTO ai_evaluation_items ( ai_evaluation_id, category, score, comment ) VALUES
( #{evaluationId}, #{item.category}, #{item.score}, #{item.comment} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.title, r.summary, r.visibility, r.is_primary, r.updated_at, latest_ai.overall_score AS ai_score, COALESCE(skills.tags_csv, '') AS tags_csv, items.module_score, items.integration_score, latest_ai.summary AS ai_summary, COALESCE(items.suggestion_comments, '') AS suggestion_comments FROM resumes r JOIN personal_profiles pp ON pp.id = r.personal_profile_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ae.id, ae.overall_score, ae.summary FROM ai_evaluations ae WHERE ae.resume_id = r.id ORDER BY ae.created_at DESC, ae.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_ai ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%module%' OR LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%tech%' THEN aei.score END) AS module_score, MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%integration%' OR LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%fico%' THEN aei.score END) AS integration_score, STRING_AGG(aei.comment, '||' ORDER BY aei.id) FILTER (WHERE aei.comment IS NOT NULL AND aei.comment != '') AS suggestion_comments FROM ai_evaluation_items aei WHERE aei.ai_evaluation_id = latest_ai.id ) items ON TRUE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rss.resume_id, STRING_AGG(ss.name, ',' ORDER BY rss.is_primary DESC, rss.id) AS tags_csv FROM resume_sap_skills rss JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = rss.sap_skill_id GROUP BY rss.resume_id ) skills ON skills.resume_id = r.id WHERE pp.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.is_primary DESC, r.updated_at DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.summary, r.visibility, r.is_primary, r.created_at, r.updated_at, latest_ai.overall_score AS ai_score, latest_ai.summary AS ai_summary, items.module_score, items.integration_score, COALESCE(items.suggestion_comments, '') AS suggestion_comments, f.original_name AS original_file_name FROM resumes r JOIN personal_profiles pp ON pp.id = r.personal_profile_id LEFT JOIN files f ON f.id = r.resume_file_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ae.id, ae.overall_score, ae.summary FROM ai_evaluations ae WHERE ae.resume_id = r.id ORDER BY ae.created_at DESC, ae.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_ai ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%module%' OR LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%tech%' THEN aei.score END) AS module_score, MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%integration%' OR LOWER(aei.category) LIKE '%fico%' THEN aei.score END) AS integration_score, STRING_AGG(aei.comment, '||' ORDER BY aei.id) FILTER (WHERE aei.comment IS NOT NULL AND aei.comment != '') AS suggestion_comments FROM ai_evaluation_items aei WHERE aei.ai_evaluation_id = latest_ai.id ) items ON TRUE WHERE pp.user_id = #{userId} AND r.id = #{resumeId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT rss.id, ss.code, ss.name, ss.skill_type, rss.proficiency_level, rss.years_of_experience, rss.is_primary AS primary FROM resume_sap_skills rss JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = rss.sap_skill_id WHERE rss.resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY rss.is_primary DESC, rss.id

SELECT id, company_name, project_name, position, role, project_type, industry, start_date, end_date, is_current AS "current", description FROM resume_experiences WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY start_date DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
